ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "is_tabu" INTEGER /* Indicates if the neighborhood is tabu */,
  "is_legal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the neighborhood is legal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., duration, cost, penalty) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_explored" (
  "explored_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explored event */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy that explored the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood that was explored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exploration event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exploration event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explored_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_explored_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tabu_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tabu status record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "is_tabu" INTEGER /* Indicates if the neighborhood is tabu */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the neighborhood being tabu */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tabu status was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tabu status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tabu_status_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal status record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "is_legal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the neighborhood is legal */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the neighborhood being legal or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the legal status was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the legal status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_status_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soft_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soft constraint violation */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy that violated the constraint */,
  "violation_count" INTEGER /* Number of violations */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint violation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the soft constraint violation was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the soft constraint violation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy that incurred the penalty */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the penalty was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the penalty was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy that incurred the cost */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cost was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cost was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id")
)
